prompts.prompt: Add input validation to the createUser function in src/users.ts using Zod schemas. Validate email format, require password minimum 8 characters with at least one number and one uppercase letter, and return 400 with structured validation errors. Preserve all existing tests in test/users.test.ts.
prompts.description: Well-specified code change with constraints and preservation

prompts.prompt: The OAuth callback handler in auth/callback.ts returns a 500 error when the refresh token is expired. Expected behavior: redirect to /login with a flash message. The error only occurs in production with Redis session store. Debug and fix the root cause, do not add a try-catch wrapper.

Write a technical blog post (1500-2000 words) explaining how our rate limiting system works. Target audience: senior engineers evaluating our API. Cover the token bucket algorithm, burst handling, and per-tenant limits. Include code examples in Python. Tone: authoritative but accessible.
prompts.description: Detailed writing request with format and audience

prompts.prompt: Refactor the PaymentProcessor class to use the Strategy pattern. Extract each payment method (stripe, paypal, bank_transfer) into its own class implementing a PaymentStrategy interface. Keep the public API unchanged. All 47 tests in test/payments/ must still pass.
prompts.description: Specific refactoring with pattern and test preservation
Vague with no target or specifics

prompts.prompt: Review the authentication middleware in src/middleware/auth.ts for security vulnerabilities. Check for: JWT validation bypasses, timing attacks in token comparison, missing rate limiting on login attempts. Report findings with severity levels.

Create a REST API endpoint POST /api/v2/invoices that generates PDF invoices. Accept line items, tax rate, and customer info. Use Puppeteer for PDF generation from an HTML template. Return the PDF as a downloadable file. Add OpenAPI documentation. Handle errors: invalid items, tax calculation overflow, template rendering failures.

Analyze our database query patterns in the last 30 days of slow query logs. Identify the top 5 queries by total execution time. For each, explain why it is slow and suggest a specific index or query rewrite. Format as a markdown table.
prompts.description: Analysis request with specific output format

prompts.prompt: Plan the migration from PostgreSQL 12 to PostgreSQL 16. Consider: breaking changes in jsonb operators, extension compatibility (PostGIS, pg_trgm), connection pooling (PgBouncer config changes), and a rollback strategy. Produce a phased timeline with go/no-go checkpoints.

prompts.description: No target, no specifics, no constraints

prompts.prompt: Research the current state of WebAssembly support in major browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). Compare WASI support levels, threading capabilities, and garbage collection proposals. Summarize in a comparison table with version numbers.

Add dark mode support to the dashboard. Use CSS custom properties for all colors. Toggle should persist in localStorage. Respect the prefers-color-scheme media query for initial state. Do not change any existing component APIs.

Draft an incident postmortem for the 2-hour API outage on March 1st. Include: timeline of events, root cause (connection pool exhaustion from leaked connections in the batch job), impact (35% of API requests failed), remediation steps taken, and 3 follow-up action items with owners and deadlines.

Write a SQL migration to add soft-delete support to the users, orders, and products tables. Add deleted_at timestamp column (nullable, indexed). Update the existing queries in src/db/queries.ts to filter out soft-deleted rows. Add a scheduled job to hard-delete records older than 90 days.
prompts.description: Data migration with multiple steps and automation
